full_text:
Gao Lan 高覽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Lan (高覽). Originally a talented officer of Yuan Shao. Defected with Zhang He to Wei. Gao Lan was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom.
